title: Septic shock with goals-of-care conflict

patient_summary.vitals: BP 84/50 on fluids, HR 122, RR 30, altered mentation
patient_summary.labs: Lactate high, creatinine rising, platelets low

required_nursing_actions: hourly urine output and MAP charting
contraindicated_orders: continued fluid-only strategy despite shock progression
consultant_preferred_plan: urgent escalation with explicit goals-of-care discussion
